---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new specification, mapping, or documentation improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## Summary

Brief description of the feature or improvement (e.g. new compliance mapping, expanded threat model section, new deployment pattern).

## Motivation

Why is this valuable for the ACR Framework? Who does it help (implementers, compliance, security)?

## Proposed change

- New or updated document:
- Key content or structure:

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or existing references.

## Additional context

Links, standards, or prior discussion (e.g. GitHub Discussions).
